name: coremltools
pricing_notes: Open source (BSD 3-Clause); Apple framework; no costs

performance.notes: Enables Neural Engine (ANE) execution — 10-50x faster than CPU on Apple Silicon for supported models

agent_readiness.notes: Apple's toolkit for converting PyTorch/TensorFlow models to Core ML format for deployment on Apple devices (iOS, macOS). Enables Neural Engine (ANE) acceleration on Apple Silicon. INT4/INT8 quantization for LLMs. Supports Python-to-Swift bridge for on-device inference. Required for App Store AI features. Used by whisper.cpp, stable diffusion for Apple, and on-device LLM apps.

gotchas: Apple devices only — no cross-platform deployment
Not all PyTorch ops supported — custom ops require significant effort
LLM support improving rapidly but still limited compared to llama.cpp
best_when: Deploying models to iOS/macOS apps with Neural Engine acceleration
On-device inference for privacy-sensitive applications (medical, personal data)
App Store apps requiring ML features (Apple ecosystem)
Maximizing battery efficiency for ML on Apple Silicon
summary: coremltools is Apple's Python toolkit for converting PyTorch/TensorFlow models to Core ML format for deployment on Apple devices. Enables Neural Engine (ANE) hardware acceleration on Apple Silicon, providing 10-50x speedup over CPU. Supports INT4/INT8 LLM quantization. Required for production iOS/macOS ML apps in the App Store. Best for on-device AI features in Apple ecosystem applications.
